claim: MC pattern inferences become more scientifically useful when each proposed relationship includes at least one positive-control expectation, one negative-control expectation, and one disconfirming observation route before promotion.
revision_reason: Adds a stronger scientific reasoning gate after counterfactual prediction by requiring controls that can separate true signal from expectation, attention bias, coincidence, or symbolic overfit.
falsification_route: The gate fails if a promoted relationship lacks a positive control, negative control, disconfirming route, measurable variables, source boundary, privacy boundary, or blocked unsafe route list.
next_executable_action: Run validate_negative_control_gate.py against this fixture and add at least one failing fixture before integrating with broader Forge CI.

test_cases.revision_reason: Converted symbolic pattern language into control-ready measurement logic.
test_cases.proposed_relationship: Context-switch language may improve sensemaking quality when it produces separable observations, controls, and next actions.
test_cases.source_boundary: synthetic observation only; no medical, veterinary, or factual-world claim is made

positive_control.expectation: When a packet includes an explicit context switch reason, independent reviewers should more often identify why the inference changed.

negative_control.expectation: When unrelated symbolic words are inserted without a context switch reason, reviewer accuracy should not increase above baseline.

disconfirming_observations: Reviewer accuracy improves equally in unrelated-symbol packets and reasoned-switch packets.
Reviewers cannot distinguish observation, interpretation, and action fields above chance.
Missingness labels are ignored or treated as absence by downstream summaries.
test_cases.falsification_route: If negative-control packets improve the same amount as reasoned-switch packets, the observed benefit is likely attention, style, or novelty rather than context-switch structure.
test_cases.next_executable_action: Create ten paired packets: five with reasoned context switches and five with unrelated symbolic insertions, then score blinded reviewer accuracy.

test_cases.revision_reason: Insufficient; claim promoted from resonance without controls.
test_cases.proposed_relationship: A symbolic phrase proves a new mechanism.
test_cases.next_executable_action: Rewrite as a measurement plan with a negative control and disconfirming observations.
